behavior_summary: Provides Rhian NPC's reactive behaviors: what she says when examined (U8P_RHIAN::look) and how she responds to theft, spells, area entry/exit, and scheduled activities.

RHIAN::look emits a short description string: if Rhian is dead it barks a corpse description; otherwise it composes a short description from global flags (rhianName and rhianJob) producing one of: full name+job, name only, job only, or 'woman'.

RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething implements an escalating theft-response sequence driven by rhianMoveCheck and stolenOnce: gentle warning → firmer warning → calling/alerting guards via CALGUARD::0080 (unless guardsCalled suppresses it). It also clears area/script refs via resetRef.

Scheduling and area triggers (RHIAN::schedule, RHIAN::enterFastArea, RHIAN::leaveFastArea) read map/schedule state (via FREE helpers and rhianSchedule), set rhianSchedule and rhiangrieving/rhianKneeling as appropriate, spawn short animation/behavior methods (METHOD::*), and manage local visual state.

Specialized small behaviors (kneeling/grieving routines) set flags (rhianKneeling, rhiangrieving), pick randomized lines via urandom, spawn animation/facing helper methods, and then update/reset references.
notable_control_flow: U8P_RHIAN::look: branch on Npc::isDead. If dead -> bark corpse text; else compose description based on rhianName and rhianJob flags and call Item::bark with the chosen string (high confidence).

U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething: read Item::getType of the stolen object, read rhianMoveCheck and stolenOnce, then advance rhianMoveCheck through an escalation sequence (0→1→2→3) while possibly setting stolenOnce and spawning CALGUARD::0080; resetRef is called to clear area refs during/after the response (high confidence).

U8P_RHIAN::schedule: queries FREE::* helpers and toranDead to choose and write rhianSchedule and clear/set rhianKneeling; then spawns schedule-specific methods to enact movement/animations (medium-high confidence).

U8P_RHIAN::enterFastArea: on fast-area entry checks current map/schedule and state flags (rhiangrieving, rhianSitting, rhianKneeling) and spawns short reaction/behavior methods (METHOD::15E7/METHOD::143A etc.) appropriate to the schedule/state (medium-high confidence).
U8P_RHIAN::leaveFastArea: iterates resetRef over stored refs to clean up references used while the player was inside the trigger area (high confidence).
open_questions: Exact item shape/type constants checked by Item::getType in AvatarStoleSomething (which items trigger guard-calling vs a milder reaction) — inferred but not explicit.

Precise semantics and return values of the FREE::* helpers (FREE::1C19, FREE::28F9, FREE::2A56) used by schedule() — appear to query map/tile/schedule data but exact meaning of return bytes is uncertain.
Exact strings and pluralization rules used in all bark() calls beyond the high-level descriptions — lines are inferred from disassembly but full line table is not present.

Precise parameters and visual effect of spawned METHOD::* calls (METHOD::15E7, METHOD::143A, METHOD::133F, METHOD::15E7 usage patterns) — appear to control animation/orientation but details are engine-specific.
How guardsCalled is set elsewhere in the game and whether CALGUARD::0080 always results in immediate combat or just an alert — integration behavior is external to this script.

main_function.name: U8P_RHIAN::look
main_function.purpose: Produce a short description when a player/actor examines Rhian: if dead, bark a corpse description; otherwise compose and bark a short descriptor using rhianName and rhianJob flags (e.g., 'Rhian the weaver', 'Rhian', 'weaver', or 'woman').
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_RHIAN::look) triggered by a player/actor examining the NPC
Parameter viewer_pid (the process/player looking) is supplied

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::look
function_map.role: Handle examine/U8P_RHIAN::look event for Rhian; compose and emit descriptive bark text.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: React to player stealing from Rhian with an escalating warning sequence and possible guard call; clear area refs.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::schedule
function_map.role: Select and set Rhian's active schedule (rhianSchedule) based on FREE queries and toranDead, spawn schedule behaviors.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::cast
function_map.role: React to being targeted by a spell/cast (yell for help or call guards depending on target/state).

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler that spawns short reactions/behaviors based on schedule and state flags (kneeling/grieving/sitting).

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit handler that resets/clears stored area/script references via resetRef.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::0631
function_map.role: Kneeling behavior subroutine: set rhianKneeling, play crying/sniff lines and animations then clear/update refs.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::06DC
function_map.role: Grieving behavior: emit sob/sniff lines, spawn animations, and schedule subsequent movement/animation.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::0794
function_map.role: Set rhiangrieving and produce short animation/facing spawns used to show grieving reactions.

function_map.name: Npc::isDead
function_map.role: Engine routine used to determine whether the NPC is dead (affects U8P_RHIAN::look() and other behaviors).

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/process call that makes an NPC or item emit a short text string to a player/process.

function_map.name: Item::getType
function_map.role: Return type id of an item reference; used to classify stolen items.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::resetRef
function_map.role: Clear/reset stored script/area references (used during leaveFastArea and theft reaction).

function_map.name: CALGUARD::0080
function_map.role: Spawn to request/alert guards when theft escalation requires it.

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Engine helper used by schedule/behavior logic for map/tile/schedule queries (inferred).

function_map.name: FREE::28F9
function_map.role: Engine helper used by schedule/behavior logic for map/tile/schedule queries (inferred).

function_map.name: METHOD::15E7
function_map.role: Spawned helper method used to trigger small animations or orientation changes.

internal_calls.purpose: Check if Rhian is dead to choose corpse vs live description branch.
After theft escalation the schedule may be consulted or movement state updated (inferred sequencing between theft response and schedule updates).
Spawn kneeling behavior when schedule/state indicates kneeling should occur on area entry.
Spawn grieving behavior when rhiangrieving or schedule indicates grieving on fast-area entry.

external_calls.purpose: Emit the chosen short description string to the player/process who looked at Rhian.
Determine the stolen object's type to decide the theft response and whether to call guards.
Clear stored area/script references as part of theft handling cleanup.
Alert or call guards when the theft escalation reaches the threshold (unless guardsCalled suppresses it).
Query map/tile/schedule related data used to pick rhianSchedule (exact query semantics inferred).
Spawn short animations/orientation changes when the player enters Rhian's fast-area trigger.
Select randomized crying/sniff lines or animation timing for the kneeling behavior.

reads.name: rhianName
reads.likely_effect: Controls use of the short name 'Rhian' vs other descriptors in U8P_RHIAN::look() output.

reads.name: rhianJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls inclusion of Rhian's job ('weaver') in the composed U8P_RHIAN::look() description.

reads.name: rhianSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Read to select behavior when entering fast areas and by theft/schedule logic; indicates currently selected schedule index.

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: If set, suppresses guard-calling behavior during theft handling.

reads.name: rhianMoveCheck
reads.likely_effect: Holds theft-response escalation state used to pick warnings or trigger guard calls.

reads.name: rhiangrieving
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether grieving behaviors should be used on area entry and in schedule logic.

reads.name: rhianSitting
reads.likely_effect: Affects selection of short animation/spawns on area entry (visual state influence).

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Alters schedule selection in schedule() when Toran NPC is dead.

reads.name: stolenOnce
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the initial gentle theft warning after the first theft; used to change verbal response.

writes.name: rhianSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Set by schedule() to select Rhian's active behavior/schedule for use by enterFastArea and other routines.

writes.name: stolenOnce
writes.likely_effect: Set on the first theft to avoid repeating the initial gentle warning in future thefts.

writes.name: rhianMoveCheck
writes.likely_effect: Advanced to escalate theft responses (0→1→2→3) influencing messages and guard-calls.

writes.name: rhianKneeling
writes.likely_effect: Set/cleared to indicate kneeling behavior is active (controls animations/spawns related to kneeling).

writes.name: rhiangrieving
writes.likely_effect: Toggled to indicate grieving mode and cause grieving-specific reactions on area entry.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides Rhian NPC's reactive behaviors: what she says when examined (U8P_RHIAN::look) and how she responds to theft, spells, area entry/exit, and scheduled activities.
